title: aes.rs: public gcm_decrypt tag param uses bare [u8; 16] not constant
description: gcm_decrypt takes tag: &[u8; 16] in its public signature, and gcm_encrypt returns (Vec<u8>, [u8; 16]). The file defines AES_GCM_TAG_LEN for this exact purpose but the public API surface still uses the bare literal. When AES_GCM_TAG_LEN is changed to usize (per elegance issue wolfssl-rs-el9.1), the signatures can become &[u8; AES_GCM_TAG_LEN] and (Vec<u8>, [u8; AES_GCM_TAG_LEN]), making the meaning of 16 explicit to callers reading the function signature without consulting the body. This is blocked on the usize fix.
